object_a.label: cabinet
object_a.description: Low dark wood cabinet/dresser centered under the windows
object_a.long_form_open_description: A low, dark wood dresser or cabinet placed against the far wall between the two windows. It has a flat top with small decorative items and possibly a tray; style matches the bed's dark wood finish.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Centered between the two windows on the far wall; visible directly opposite the foot of the bed.

object_b.description: low dark wood dresser centered under windows
object_b.long_form_open_description: Rectangular low dresser with multiple drawers, dark wood finish consistent with other furniture; placed against the far wall directly beneath the pair of windows; decorative items (small white object) visible on top.
